proposed_item.action: Extend the continuity index with linked commit, decision, contradiction, supersession, and unresolved-state records without overwriting earlier observations.
required_evidence: explicit source blob or commit identity
proposed_item.first_slice: Resolve the post-M-001 queue gap as an observed repository-state record and preserve the handoff as executable successor scope.

privacy_boundary: Public repository state only; no private chat, health, credentials, or identifying personal material.
acceptance_test: The source queue blob shows M-001 completed and zero active or queued continuity-owned items; CURRENT_STATE.json shows continuity_mining remains active; the proposal is additive and does not rewrite ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
next_action: Merge or otherwise adopt M-002 into the canonical queue, then add the first linked decision-history and contradiction records to the continuity index.
